distinct_id.description: Filter to only events from this distinct ID. Useful for verifying a specific user/session.

event_types.description: Filter to only events with these names (e.g. ["$pageview", "user_signed_up"]). Omit to receive every event.

limit.description: Maximum number of events to collect before returning. Defaults to 50, capped at 200.

properties.description: Exact-match property filters as a map of property → expected string value (e.g. {"$current_url": "https://example.com/checkout"}). Multiple entries are AND-combined.

wait_seconds.description: How long (in seconds) to listen for events before returning what was collected. Defaults to 10, capped at 30.
